Ladies' Aid society of the Corbin
Park Congregational church this
afternoon at her home, 623 Euclid
avenue.


& & 4
ENTERTAINs FOR COLLEGE


CHUM.


A color note of lavender was pre-
dominentn at the pretty bridge
luncheon given yesterday afternoon
by Miss Doris Dow in honor of Miss
Edna Roberts, who was her college
chum at Smith. Covers were laid
for IL.


CLUB WOMEN TO MEET.
A meeting will be held this after
noon by the representatives of the
various women's clubs of the city
at the Y. w. c. A. They will make
final arrangements and appoint
committees to take charge of the
program for Woman's day, October
4, at the Interstate fair.


& 4 &
WILL VISIT At FISH LAKE.
Mrs. r. b. Ennis will leave Mon
day for a weeks visit with her son,
E. R. Ennis. and family at Fish
lake.
